## Testing

<!-- List the commands you ran. If a check was not run, explain why. -->

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm type-check`
- [ ] `pnpm test:run`
- [ ] E2E coverage updated or not needed

## Checklist

- [ ] I targeted the `develop` branch
- [ ] I followed the existing code style and import conventions
- [ ] I updated documentation or release notes when user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behavior
- [ ] I did not include secrets, org credentials, or Salesforce session data
